SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass

Interface Monoid<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Semigroup<T>
public interface Monoid<T> extends Semigroup<T>
An algebraic structure consisting of a set together with a single binary operation and an identity element.
